summary: Iteration 17: Frontend-only testing of notification click feature. All 5 test features passed: 1) Navigation to correct tab (forms/quotations/contracts) based on notification type, 2) Row highlighting with yellow background, 3) Notification marked as read, 4) Dropdown closes after click, 5) URL updates with tab & highlight parameters.
critical_code_review_comments: NotificationBell.js handleNotificationClick() correctly implements the click flow: markAsRead -> getNavigationUrl -> close dropdown -> navigate
AdminDashboard.js properly handles URL searchParams for tab switching and highlightedId state
Highlight styling (bg-yellow-100 ring-2 ring-yellow-400) is applied correctly and fades after 3 seconds
URL cleanup works correctly - highlight param is cleared after timeout

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 5 notification click features working correctly

seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification click feature fully implemented and tested. Feature flow: Click notification -> API marks as read -> dropdown closes -> navigate to /dashboard?tab={type}&highlight={id} -> row shows yellow highlight for 3 seconds -> URL params cleared. Three notification types tested: form_submitted (tab=forms), agreement_signed (tab=contracts), proposal_accepted (tab=quotations).

findings: Row correctly highlighted with classes: bg-yellow-100 ring-2 ring-yellow-400
highlightedId state properly cleared after timeout
API call PUT /api/notifications/{id}/read made for unread notifications
Blue dot indicator removed after clicking
Blue background (bg-blue-50) removed from notification item
Dropdown element no longer visible after click
URL correctly includes tab parameter based on notification type
URL correctly includes highlight parameter with related_id
URL parameters cleared after 3 second timeout

mocked_apis.email_notifications: MOCKED - Email sending via SMTP is mocked
